title: Would-be UFO whistleblower died of accidental drug overdose after agreeing to testify to Congress
description: The mysterious death is of "grave concern" to Rep. Eric Burlison, who referred the matter for investigation to the FBI due to "implications for national security."

title: Congressman Reveals Alarming UFO Reports, Hints at Pending Disclosure
description: Representative Tim Burchett discusses classified reports of UAPs he has reviewed, citing a Navy admiral's account of a massive underwater object and concerns about the treatment of servicemen who report such phenomena. He links these reports to President Trump's promise of releasing government files on UFOs and mentions reports of scientists involved in classified research facing issues.

title: 'Unexpected and unnatural' light linked to Chinese rocket, not a UFO
description: The light shot across the Otago sky on Friday night, shortly after a rocket launch in China, an astronomer says.

title: 'Unexpected and unatural' light linked to Chinese rocket, not a UFO
description: The light shot across the Otago sky on Friday night, shortly after a rocket launch in China, an astronomer says.

title: 'Please Don't Be Stupid': UFO Researcher's Chilling Last Words Before His Death at 53 Revealed — Fueling Questions Over Missing or Deceased Scientists
description: There was little ambiguity surrounding David Wilcock’s death, as the 53-year-old fatally shot himself in front of responding officers on April 20.
